playbook.intent: Founder reviews cash position, AR, AP, contractor utilization. Output: AR follow-up list + utilization heat map + go/no-go on next contractor hire.
playbook.scope: Founder reviews cash position, AR, AP, contractor utilization. Output: AR follow-up list + utilization heat map + go/no-go on next contractor hire.

success-criteria.criterion: All 3 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Pull the Numbers
stage.intent: Cash, AR, AP, utilization — fresh today.

tasks.task: Pull current bank balance and 13-week cash projection
Pull AR aging and AP aging
Pull contractor and founder utilization for the week

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all four numbers are current as of today.

stage.name: Diagnose
stage.intent: Find the one thing to fix this week.

tasks.task: Compare runway to target; flag if <90 days
Look at AR aging; pick the chase-targets for Monday
Compare utilization to capacity; spot over- or under-loading

stage.decision-gate: Advance when at most 3 items are tagged as this-week's focus.

stage.name: Act on the Top Item

tasks.task: Send chase emails or invoices owed
Move contractor / founder allocation if utilization is off
Log the move in the recurring-actions sheet

stage.decision-gate: Required output: at least one written action sent today.
